title: Juneteenth was Joyful in Fairbanks
summary: KUAC staff enjoyed being a part of the Juneteenth event sponsored by the NAACP. The borough issued a proclamation making June 19 “Juneteenth.” The celebration included songs, food and education to enhance self-awareness and unity. title: Easy Meals in the McNeil River Backcountry
summary: The ideal meal plan for a week of bear viewing at the famous McNeil River State Game Sanctuary. The post Easy Meals in the McNeil River Backcountry appeared first on Alaska Magazine .
